name: Elasticsearch
description: Elasticsearch is a distributed, RESTful search and analytics engine. This container installs a single-node deployment from the official Elastic APT repository with X-Pack security enabled.

notes.text: Security is enabled, so the HTTP API is served over HTTPS with a self-signed certificate (use curl -k). The generated 'elastic' superuser password is stored in /root/elasticsearch.creds.
Reset the password at any time with: /usr/share/elasticsearch/bin/elasticsearch-reset-password -u elastic
